questions.question: A fair coin is flipped 5 times. What is the probability that exactly 3 heads are obtained?

A software developer completes 8 tasks out of 12 with a high level of quality. If the probability of completing a task with high quality is 0.9, what is the probability that exactly 5 tasks were completed with high quality?
A survey of 20 students found that 9 students prefer pizza and 5 students prefer sushi. What is the probability that the next student surveyed prefers pizza?
